mapper.select: SELECT enable_flag AS enable_flag, COUNT(*) AS count FROM dc3_driver WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} GROUP BY enable_flag
SELECT driver_type_flag AS driver_type_flag, COUNT(*) AS count FROM dc3_driver WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} GROUP BY driver_type_flag
SELECT enable_flag AS enable_flag, COUNT(*) AS count FROM dc3_device WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} GROUP BY enable_flag
SELECT driver_id AS driver_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM dc3_device WHERE deleted = 0 AND tenant_id = #{tenantId} GROUP BY driver_id ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT b.profile_id AS profile_id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM dc3_profile_bind b WHERE b.deleted = 0 AND b.tenant_id = #{tenantId} GROUP BY b.profile_id ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT #{limit}
